name: Shrimp Mousse Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve tomato soup and cream cheese over a low heat.
2. Remove from heat.
3. Mix together the gelatin and water.
4. Combine all ingredients in a mold or pan.
5. Chill for at least 2 hours.
6. Serve with various types of crackers - Ritz are excellent.
7. Do NOT cover with foil. A reaction of the foil and the tomato soup causes holes to form in the foil!
